record.field:
Fitness Industry

This industry is perfect for fitness centers that excel in managing their operations and offering a top-notch experience to their clients. From maintaining equipment and scheduling appointments to managing subscriptions and running a smooth point-of-sale system with products and stock management, everything is covered. 


Plus, you'll have a fantastic website and robust social marketing tools to attract new members and keep your community engaged. Whether it's planning fitness programs, collaborating with vendors, keeping an eye on the budget, handling invoicing, or delivering exceptional customer service, we've got you covered. Get ready to take your fitness business to the next level!

Fitness Industry Business Flows Never miss an opportunity 🎯 Easily manage your fitness center with our all-in-one solution! 💪 Keep an eye on your fitness center's inventory 📦 Automate Your Reordering Process 🚀 Customize and Monitor Your Inventory 📊 Transition to Point of Sale and eCommerce 📈 Invoice at the right time 📈 Resources management  Appointment Scheduling/Management Take care of your equipments Business expansion 🚀📈 Marketing Campaigns

Business Flows

Never miss an opportunity 🎯

The CRM application allow you to collect the requests from your potential customers by aggregating several sources:

  • Create an opportunity each time you faced a potential customer, receive a phone call, etc.
  • Redirect the emails sent to info@my-fitness-business.com to the CRM .
  • The Website app has a contact form that already redirects the people that fill the form directly to the CRM in the lead tab.

Never miss nor forget an opportunity. The CRM centralizes everything and allows you to efficiently ensure the follow-up of each request. If the request becomes concrete, create the customer in the Contact app. 

🎓  CRM

Easily manage your fitness center with our all-in-one solution! 💪


Create Tailor-Made Subscriptions and Sell Products Effortlessly 🛒

At any time, create customized subscriptions for your members that clearly display pricing, discounts, and details of each:

  • Fitness classes and personal training sessions
  • Membership plans with different durations and benefits


Feel free to create all the needed products you often sell, such as supplements and workout gear. This will save you time for the next subscriptions.


If the customer replies to the email, the response is automatically logged in the chatter on the right of the screen. All discussions regarding the quotation, updates, and fine-tuning are attached, making it easy for all involved users to consult the history.


Once confirmed, the quotation becomes a sales order. All quotations and sales orders are centralized in the Sales app.


🎓 Sales


Keep an eye on your fitness center's inventory 📦

Selling food and consumables at your fitness center? With Odoo, you can automate your reordering process, ensuring you never run out of stock. Here's how to make the most of Odoo's inventory management features:

Automate Your Reordering Process 🚀

  1. Set Up Automatic Reordering:
    • Navigate to the Inventory App: Go to the Inventory app in Odoo.
    • Create Reordering Rules: Click on the Products menu and select Reordering Rules. Here, you can set minimum and maximum quantities for each product to trigger automatic reordering.
    • Choose Your Vendors: Select the vendors you want to reorder from. You can also add bulk pricing options to save time and money.
  1. Check Stock Levels:
    • Confirm Orders: When an order is confirmed, a delivery is automatically created in the Inventory app. This allows you to keep track of stock levels and ensure you have enough inventory for your daily operations.
    • Resupply as Needed: If stock levels are low, create a purchase order from the Purchase app. Link it to the right vendor to ensure timely replenishment.

🎓Inventory

Customize and Monitor Your Inventory 📊

  1. Product Setup:
    • Navigate to the Product App: Go to the Product app and select the products you want to customize.
    • Set Up Pricing Rules: Adjust the pricing rules and margins to align with your business strategy.
    • Bulk Pricing: Add bulk pricing options for vendors and customer to save on large orders.
  1. Track:
    • Inventory Adjustments: Make inventory adjustments as needed. Go to the Inventory app and select Inventory Adjustments to update stock levels manually.

🎓Purchase

Transition to Point of Sale and eCommerce 📈


Now that we've covered inventory and vendor management, let's dive into how you can extend all of these features to your Point of Sale (POS) system and seamlessly link it to your website for a complete eCommerce solution.


Effortlessly manage your Point of Sale 💵


Of course, all of this functionality is extendable to your POS system. With Odoo's integrated POS app, you can set up a cash register, manage sales transactions, and track inventory in real-time. This means that as soon as a sale is made, your stock levels are updated automatically, ensuring you never run out of popular items. 🎓Point of Sale


Setting up your POS system is a breeze. Simply navigate to the POS app, configure your cash register, and customize your product listings. The system supports various payment methods, making it convenient for your customers to complete their purchases. Plus, you can generate detailed sales reports to keep track of your daily, weekly, and monthly performance.



Effortlessly manage your eCommerce 💵


🎓 eCommerce


Setting up your online store is as easy as customizing a few settings. Go to the Website app, choose your theme, and start adding your products. You can offer various payment options, manage shipping methods, and even set up automated marketing campaigns to boost your sales. With real-time inventory updates, your customers will always know what's available, enhancing their shopping experience.


Invoice at the right time 📈

As the first invoicing step, create a down payment from the sales order. This will generate the first invoice in the Invoicing app. Then, schedule one or several "Invoicing Schedule" activities on the sales order with the aim to never forget to send an intermediary invoice in order to sustain your cash flow

Thanks to the invoicing policy that you can modify, the generated invoice is always the reflect of the reality on the field and it is fair for the customer.

🎓 Invoicing

Resources management 

Appointment Scheduling/Management


Managing appointments effectively requires a robust resource management system that can handle various elements seamlessly. Odoo offers comprehensive solutions for employee management, appointment scheduling, and resource allocation, ensuring your operations run smoothly. Let’s explore how Odoo manages appointment .


Appointment Scheduling and Resource Allocation 🗓️🏋️‍♂️


Odoo allows you to enhance your appointment scheduling by adding various resources such as classes and coaches. Whether you offer fitness classes, personal training sessions, or educational courses, you can:


  • Add Resources: Easily add resources like classes or coaches to your system.
  • Link to Courses: Connect resources to specific courses that can be either free or paid, depending on the user’s subscription status.
  • Customize Availability: Set availability for different resources, ensuring that your scheduling system is always up-to-date.
  • Comprehensive Scheduling: Plan and manage schedules, allowing customers to book appointments directly from your website, manage classes and sessions, and track attendance.
  • Website Integration: Seamlessly integrate all these features into your website, providing a unified experience for your customers to book appointments, view class schedules, and manage subscriptions online.


🎓Appointment


Take care of your equipments


Ensuring your equipment is always in top-notch condition is crucial for smooth operations. Odoo's Maintenance app provides a comprehensive solution for managing all your maintenance needs. From defining equipment to creating maintenance requests and assigning repair tasks, Odoo simplifies every aspect of maintenance management. Let’s dive into how Odoo can transform your maintenance processes.


Equipment Definition and Maintenance Requests 🛠️🔧


Managing maintenance effectively starts with having a clear overview of your equipment and its status. Odoo allows you to:


  • Define Equipment: Create detailed profiles for each piece of equipment, including specifications, usage history,emplacement,  and maintenance requirements.
  • Create Maintenance Requests: Easily generate maintenance requests when equipment needs repair or servicing. These requests can be categorized and prioritized based on urgency.
  • Assign Personnel: Assign maintenance tasks to specific employees or teams, ensuring that the right person is handling the repair.
  • Track Progress: Monitor the status of maintenance requests in real-time, from creation to completion, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.
  • Integration with Employee Management: Link maintenance tasks to employee schedules, ensuring efficient allocation of resources.


🎓Maintenance


Business expansion 🚀📈

Marketing Campaigns


Effective marketing is the key to attracting new customers and retaining existing ones. Odoo's suite of marketing tools allows you to create, manage, and analyze your marketing campaigns seamlessly. From social media integration to automated marketing flows, Odoo has everything you need to elevate your marketing strategy.


 Create and Manage Marketing Campaigns 📅📊


Odoo enables you to design and execute impactful marketing campaigns with ease. Here's how you can leverage Odoo's marketing capabilities:


  • Marketing Campaigns: Design comprehensive marketing campaigns that include email marketing, social media posts, and other outreach activities. Plan your campaigns in advance and track their performance in real-time.
  • New Posts: Create engaging content for your social media channels directly from Odoo. Schedule posts to be published at optimal times and ensure consistent engagement with your audience.
  • Email marketing: Create beautiful, responsive email templates with Odoo. Personalize your email content based on customer data. Use dynamic content blocks to tailor messages.
  • Analytics and Reports: Measure the success of your marketing efforts with detailed analytics and reports. Understand what works best for your audience and refine your strategies accordingly.


🎓Marketing

🎓Emailing
